quiz.title: Pre-calculus: Unit 6 Quiz 11
quiz.subtitle: 6.11: Mixed Systems and Matrices Review
quiz.subject: Mathematics
quiz.topic: 2×2 linear systems, 3×3 linear systems, nonlinear systems, matrix multiplication, Gaussian elimination, inverse matrices, solving with inverses, determinants, Cramer's Rule, and real-world applications

questions.question:
Solve the system:
$4x - 3y = 11$
$2x + y = 3$
questions.explanation: From $2x + y = 3$, $y = 3 - 2x$. Substitute into $4x - 3(3 - 2x) = 11 \implies 4x - 9 + 6x = 11 \implies 10x = 20 \implies x = 2$. Then $y = 3 - 4 = -1$.

questions.question:
Solve the system:
$x + y + z = 6$
$2x - y + z = 3$
$x + 2y - z = 3$
questions.explanation: Add (1) and (2): $3x + 2z = 9$. Add (2) and (3): $3x + y = 6 \implies y = 6 - 3x$. Substitute into (1): $x + (6-3x) + z = 6 \implies z = 2x$. Then $3x + 2(2x) = 9 \implies 7x = 9 \implies x = \frac{9}{7}$, $z = \frac{18}{7}$, $y = \frac{15}{7}$.

questions.question:
Solve the nonlinear system:
$x^2 + y^2 = 25$
$y = x + 1$
questions.explanation: Substitute $y = x + 1$: $x^2 + (x+1)^2 = 25 \implies 2x^2 + 2x - 24 = 0 \implies x^2 + x - 12 = 0 \implies (x+4)(x-3)=0$. Solutions: $x=-4 \implies y=-3$; $x=3 \implies y=4$.

questions.question:
Use Gaussian elimination to solve:
$x + 2y = 5$
$3x + 4y = 11$
questions.explanation: Augmented matrix $\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 & | & 5 \\ 3 & 4 & | & 11 \end{bmatrix}$. $-3R_1 + R_2 \to R_2$ gives $\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 & | & 5 \\ 0 & -2 & | & -4 \end{bmatrix}$. Then $-2y = -4 \implies y = 2$, and $x + 4 = 5 \implies x = 1$.

questions.question:
Use the inverse from the previous problem to solve:
$2x + 3y = 8$
$x + 4y = 9$

Use Cramer's Rule to solve for $y$:
$3x + 2y = 8$
$x - 2y = 0$
A restaurant sells tacos for $3 and burritos for $5. On Friday, they sold 120 items and made $480. How many tacos were sold?
questions.explanation: Let $t =$ tacos, $b =$ burritos. $t + b = 120$, $3t + 5b = 480$. Substitute $b = 120 - t$: $3t + 5(120 - t) = 480 \implies 3t + 600 - 5t = 480 \implies -2t = -120 \implies t = 60$.

scoreMessages.90: Excellent! You've mastered systems and matrices.
scoreMessages.70: Good work. Review Cramer's Rule and inverse matrices carefully.
scoreMessages.50: Keep practicing — focus on elimination and determinant calculations.
scoreMessages.0: Review the basics of solving linear systems and matrix operations.
